title: 80CM White Dot Cellophane Wrap Roll, HCSSZ Large Clear Spot Wrapping Roll Extra Wide 80cm x Long 30m Polka Dot cellophane Wrap Transparent Gift Wrapping for Easter Basket Hampers
features: Size：Large cellophane white dot wrapping Roll, Full 30m roll of 80cm wide, 30 micron. Perfect for wrapping bouquets, plants, gifts, hamper baskets and many other packaging uses.
Easy to use: The 80CM dot cellophane wrap roll is very easy to work with, you can wrap up all the gifts with one roll, which is very convenient.

Stronger durability: The 30 micron thickness flower gift wrap cellophane roll is durable, provides additional support for baskets, gift, treats, florist, toys and wines, will not rip or tear. It's 100% high transparent, make flowers look more bright. It can also protect the flowers.

Premium quality material: These transparent cellophane wrap dots for hampers are made from non-toxic, Eco friendly and odourless material. Since it is 100% Food Grade safe, keeping your food fresh and clean.

Multiple uses: This clear white polka dot wrap is perfect for any occasion making any gift beautiful. Use it to wrap baskets as cellophane gift bags, large gifts, wine bottles, flower arrangements, arts & craft, cookies, treats, candies, pastries.
Note: This white spot cellophane roll is folded in half then rolled and shipped in 40CM packaging, it can be expand to 80CM upon unfolding.
